articles.title: 伊朗战事实时更新：伊朗代表团抵达和谈 万斯正在途中
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: Iranian Delegation Arrives at Peace Talks, With Vance en Route
articles.summary: 当前伊朗战事停火能否持续、交战双方能否达成长期协议仍存在诸多不确定性。伊朗代表团已经抵达本次和平谈判的会场，美国副总统JD·万斯正动身前往巴基斯坦参与此次和谈。
articles.summary_original: There was much uncertainty about the durability of the cease-fire and whether the two sides could reach a long-term deal, as Vice President JD Vance traveled to Pakistan for the talks.

articles.title: 霍尔木兹停火期间伊朗驻南非使团嘲讽特朗普
articles.title_original: Iran’s South Africa Mission Trolls Trump Amid Hormuz Ceasefire
articles.summary: 霍尔木兹停火背景下，伊朗驻南非使团在官方社交平台发文嘲讽特朗普。伊朗各驻外使馆的官方社交账号已介入信息战，其中非洲地区的伊朗使馆账号在这类攻击行动中处于领先位置。
articles.summary_original: Official social media accounts for Iranian embassies have engaged in information warfare, but the ones in Africa appear to have taken the lead on the attacks.

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 打破日本工业镜头垄断，松山湖团队融资数千万
articles.summary: 位于东莞松山湖的高端工业镜头研发商阿基视觉近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由多家机构联合投资。其核心团队拥有深厚光学行业经验，已打破海外品牌垄断，实现半导体配套高端工业镜头批量国产替代，本轮融资将用于扩产研发，加速国产化替代进程。

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 深大教授AI芯片项目再融资近亿，主动式散热微系统服务传音
articles.summary: 深圳大学教授领衔创办的锐盟半导体近日完成近亿元A轮融资，由松禾资本领投，多家机构及上市公司飞荣达跟投，飞荣达同时也是其量产合作伙伴。该公司聚焦AI芯片主动式散热微系统，已和传音合作发布相关技术，本轮融资将用于技术迭代、产线建设及客户导入。

articles.title: 刘小涛在南京苏州调研服务业发展听取意见建议 - 新华网江苏频道
articles.summary: 当前多个权威媒体聚焦服务业高质量发展议题，习近平总书记对服务业高质量发展提出新要求，明确要培育更多“中国服务”品牌，有分析指出培育该品牌正当其时。此外，刘小涛赴南京苏州调研服务业发展听取意见，张工调研天津中心城区服务业发展并召开相关推进会。

articles.title: 9点1氪｜7家涉火车票销售第三方平台被约谈；45秒500万，张雪直播间拍卖冠军复刻赛车“光速”成交；亚马逊辟谣5月将裁员1.4万
articles.summary: 近日，中央网信办、国家铁路局联合约谈携程等7家涉火车票销售第三方平台，要求禁止违规技术抢票干扰12306运行；张雪直播间拍卖WSBK冠军复刻赛车，45秒以500万封顶价成交，所得将捐赠；亚马逊辟谣5月裁员1.4万，香港即将实施最严控烟令，多领域发布多项监管、产业动态。

articles.title: 乡村行 看振兴丨“智”绘田野好风光——青岛西海岸新区着力发展智慧农业 - 中国科技网
articles.summary: 多家媒体聚焦乡村振兴与春耕生产中的农业发展新实践：青岛西海岸新区着力发展智慧农业，以科技赋能农业提产；湖南常德全方位夯实粮食安全根基，守住管好“洞庭粮仓”；同时关注春耕中的新质生产力，报道了一家农机老店的三次转型历程。

articles.title: NASA阿尔忒弥斯二号溅落太平洋 登月任务实现"完美"着陆
articles.title_original: NASA Artemis II splashes down in Pacific Ocean in ‘perfect’ landing for Moon mission
articles.summary: 太平洋时间下午5点07分刚过，美国航空航天局（NASA）阿尔忒弥斯二号任务的"诚实号"航天器，溅落在美国圣地亚哥海岸外的太平洋海域，本次登月任务的返回着陆被评价为"完美"着陆。
articles.summary_original: The Integrity craft splashed down in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of San Diego just after 5:07 p.m. Pacific Time.

articles.title: 匈牙利欧尔班挑战者嗅胜机 展开最后拉票冲刺
articles.title_original: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán scents victory
articles.summary: 匈牙利总理欧尔班的挑战者彼得·毛焦尔领导的反对运动目前民调领先，毛焦尔自认有望获胜，正展开最后拉票冲刺，数万名反对欧尔班的支持者挤满布达佩斯英雄广场，声援该反对运动。
articles.summary_original: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest.

articles.title: 新华社快讯：美载人绕月飞船溅落在预定海域 - 新华网
articles.summary: 多家媒体包括新华社、美国之音等发布消息，美国阿耳忒弥斯任务的载人绕月飞船已完成行程，最终溅落在预定海域。此前各媒体持续跟进任务返程动态，先后报道了飞船返回舱即将进入大气层、任务宇航员即将返回地球等相关消息。

articles.title: 历史性万斯-加利巴夫会谈须弥合深层不信任
articles.title_original: Historic Vance-Ghalibaf talks must bridge deep distrust
articles.summary: 这场面对面会谈是1979年伊朗伊斯兰革命以来，伊朗与美国之间最高级别的双边互动。本次会谈被赋予历史性意义，双方需要通过对话化解长期积累的深度不信任，推动美伊关系实现突破。
articles.summary_original: Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution.

articles.title: 《华尔街周刊 | 伊朗石油问题余波》
articles.title_original: Wall Street Week | Iran Oil Fallout
articles.summary: 彭博本期内容涵盖美伊和谈展望、海湾国家反对美国提前结束对伊冲突，以及冲突对油价、利率的影响；世行与IMF华盛顿年会上，加拿大前财长警告滞胀与粮食危机，还将讨论全球矿产格局及中美相关竞争话题。
articles.summary_original: This week, Richard Haass of Centerview Partners on what to expect out of US-Iran peace talks. Plus, why Gulf states are begging Trump not to end the Iran war early and how the conflict could hit consumers, from gas prices to interest rates. And, former Canadian Finance Minister Chrystia Freeland warns of stagflation, a food crisis, and the growing strain on the US-led global order as finance leaders gather in Washington at the annual World Bank-IMF meetings. Later, how China quietly built a mono

articles.title: 老虎环球以3亿美元估值投资PopUp贝果
articles.title_original: Tiger Global Backs PopUp Bagels at $300 Million Valuation
articles.summary: 据知情人士透露，老虎环球已同意投资初创企业PopUp贝果，本次交易对该企业的估值为3亿美元，这一估值约为五个月前该企业报价的五倍，短短五个月该初创企业估值便实现数倍提升。
articles.summary_original: Tiger Global has agreed to invest in PopUp Bagels at a $300 million valuation, according to people familiar with the matter — roughly five times what the startup was quoted at as recently as five months ago.

articles.title: 哈斯：伊朗拥有的筹码远多于战前
articles.title_original: Haass: Iran Has Far More Leverage Than Before War
articles.summary: 美国预计将与伊朗举行会谈，以推动达成相关协议。美国前外交关系委员会主席、森特勒维尤合伙公司的理查德·哈斯警告称，不应对此次会谈抱有过高期望，战争已经表明伊朗当前掌握的筹码远多于战前，消息源自彭博社。
articles.summary_original: The US is expected to hold talks with Iran in an effort to reach an agreement, but former Council on Foreign Relations president Richard Haass of Centerview Partners warns that we should not expect too much, and that the war shows just how much leverage Iran has. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 巴基斯坦外交部：伊朗代表团抵达 巴方高官现场迎接 - 每日经济新闻
articles.summary: 多家媒体消息，美伊谈判将于11日在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行，联合国秘书长对此次谈判表示欢迎。目前伊朗代表团已抵达巴基斯坦，巴方高官到场迎接；伊朗方面称参与谈判心怀善意，但不信任美国，且已提高谈判要价。

articles.title: 黎以官员周二将在美国会晤
articles.title_original: Lebanon and Israel officials to meet in US on Tuesday
articles.summary: 黎巴嫩与以色列官员定于周二在美国举行双边会晤。此前一名黎巴嫩高级官员向BBC透露，黎方已明确表态，只有在停火协议正式生效落实的前提下，才会参与本次双方会谈。
articles.summary_original: A senior Lebanese official earlier told the BBC that Lebanon would only take part in talks if a ceasefire was in place.

articles.title: 美联储要求美国银行提供对私募信贷机构风险敞口详情
articles.title_original: Fed Seeks Details on US Banks’ Exposure to Private Credit Firms
articles.summary: 据知情人士透露，近期美国私募信贷行业出现基金赎回激增、问题贷款攀升的情况，美联储正向美国主要银行提出要求，获取这些银行对私募信贷机构风险敞口的详细信息。
articles.summary_original: The Federal Reserve is asking major US banks for details about their exposure to private credit following a surge in redemptions from the funds and a rise in troubled loans in the industry, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

articles.title: 雷吉·布什谈推出顶级高尔夫联赛UAT
articles.title_original: Reggie Bush on Launching His Premiere Golf League, UAT
articles.summary: 前NFL球员、超级碗冠军雷吉·布什，与联合运动员巡回赛首席执行官伦·布朗推出面向现役及退役运动员的顶级竞技高尔夫联赛UAT。二人做客彭博社节目《The Close》，围绕联赛创办事宜与两位主持人展开交流。
articles.summary_original: Former NFL player and Super Bowl Champion Reggie Bush and United Athletes Tour CEO Len Brown discuss launching UAT, a competitive premiere golf league aimed towards former and current athletes. They talk with Katie Greifeld and Randall Williams for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 华尔街为美伊谈判做准备 2026年4月10日收盘报道
articles.title_original: Wall Street Bracing for US-Iran Talks | The Close 4/10/2026
articles.summary: 彭博电视台推出聚焦华尔街收盘前后的最新新闻与分析节目，本期为2026年4月10日的收盘报道，节目邀请了多家金融机构从业者、退役北约盟军最高司令，以及餐饮品牌创始人、前超级碗冠军等多领域嘉宾，内容来源为彭博。

Today's guests are Federated Hermes’ RJ Gallo, Barclays’ Jon Hill, Goldman Sachs’ Alex Blostein, Fmr. Nato Supreme Allied Commander Gen. articles.title: 习近平总书记会见中国国民党主席郑丽文 - politics.people.com.cn
articles.summary: 中共中央总书记、国家主席习近平会见中国国民党主席郑丽文，这一重要时政活动的相关报道刊发于人民网政治频道，感兴趣的公众可前往Google新闻平台，查看这一活动报道的完整内容。

articles.title: 李强主持召开经济形势专家和企业家座谈会 - politics.people.com.cn
articles.summary: 国务院总理李强主持召开经济形势专家和企业家座谈会，相关内容发布于人民网政治频道，完整报道可在Google新闻平台查看。本次会议围绕经济形势交流研讨，听取专家与企业家代表的观点，为研判经济走势、推进后续经济工作提供参考。

articles.title: 哈里王子遭自身创办的慈善机构提起诽谤诉讼
articles.title_original: Prince Harry Is Sued for Libel by a Charity He Founded
articles.summary: 哈里王子所创办的慈善机构Sentebale对萨塞克斯公爵哈里王子提起诽谤诉讼。去年，哈里王子因与该慈善机构董事会及董事会主席产生冲突，已经辞去该机构赞助人职务。
articles.summary_original: Sentebale filed a defamation lawsuit against the Duke of Sussex, who resigned as patron last year after a clash between the board of trustees and the board’s chair.

articles.title: 如何观看NASA阿尔忒弥斯二号返回地球溅落
articles.title_original: How to watch NASA’s Artemis II splash back down to Earth
articles.summary: 美国国家航空航天局（NASA）的阿尔忒弥斯二号任务，飞行距离地球的远度超过以往任何任务。本次任务乘组即将返回地球，在太平洋溅落着陆，目前已公布观看此次返回着陆过程的相关方式。
articles.summary_original: NASA's Artemis II mission has traveled farther from Earth than any mission before. Here's how to watch the crew's return landing in the Pacific Ocean.

articles.title: 梅拉尼娅讲话将爱泼斯坦危机重新推至舆论焦点
articles.title_original: Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront
articles.summary: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普的公开讲话，将爱泼斯坦事件危机重新推至舆论焦点。此番表态令她正式卷入爱泼斯坦事件当中，其立场也与希望终止该事件相关调查的美国政府产生分歧，引发外界对事件走向的新关注。
articles.summary_original: She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation.

articles.title: 黑石为数据中心收购公司提交IPO申请
articles.title_original: Blackstone Files for IPO of Data Center Acquisition Firm
articles.summary: 黑石集团已为一家新型数据中心收购主体提交首次公开募股申请，该收购主体计划收购已建成并对外出租的数据中心相关物业，这类物业能够受益于当前人工智能产业的发展热潮。
articles.summary_original: Blackstone Inc. filed for an initial public offering of a new data-center acquisition vehicle that plans to buy already-built and leased properties benefiting from the artificial intelligence boom.

articles.title: 美联邦航空管理局称游戏玩家可解决空管短缺问题
articles.title_original: Now the FAA says gamers are the answer to its air traffic controller shortage
articles.summary: 美国联邦航空管理局多年来一直面临空中交通管制员短缺难题，美国政府问责局今年1月公布的数据显示，过去十年美国该岗位从业人数下降约6%。日前美联邦航空管理局提出游戏玩家可解决该短缺问题，特朗普政府正就此推进相关举措。
articles.summary_original: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has struggled for years to have enough air traffic controllers to address shortages, with the US Government Accountability Office (GAO) saying in January that the number of people in the job in the US has declined by around 6 percent "in the last decade." Now the Trump administration is rolling […]

articles.title: 矿业高管被指控侵占巴西锂矿权益
articles.title_original: Mining Executives Accused of Hijacking Brazil Lithium Claims
articles.summary: 加拿大矿产勘探企业埃梅里塔资源公司的多名高管，被加拿大安大略省证券监管机构指控，涉嫌私自将该公司位于巴西的锂矿项目权益，转移至高管们实际控制的一家新公司，引发业内对锂矿权益违规转移的关注。
articles.summary_original: Executives at Canadian minerals explorer Emerita Resources Corp. have been accused by Ontario’s securities regulator of diverting the firm’s lithium project rights to a new company they controlled.

articles.title: Anthropic临时禁止OpenClaw创作者访问Claude
articles.title_original: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
articles.summary: 人工智能企业Anthropic对OpenClaw的创作者实施临时禁令，禁止其访问旗下大模型Claude。本次禁令发生在上周Anthropic调整Claude面向OpenClaw用户的服务定价之后，目前尚未公布此次封禁的其他具体原因。
articles.summary_original: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

articles.title: Anthropic暂时禁止OpenClaw创建者访问Claude
articles.title_original: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
articles.summary: 人工智能企业Anthropic对工具OpenClaw的创建者实施临时封禁，禁止其访问自研大语言模型Claude。此次封禁行动发生在上周Anthropic调整Claude针对OpenClaw用户的定价规则之后。
articles.summary_original: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

articles.title: 20岁男子涉嫌向萨姆·奥尔特曼宅邸投掷燃烧瓶被捕

articles.title: 二十岁男子涉嫌向萨姆·奥尔特曼住宅投掷燃烧弹被捕
articles.title_original: 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman’s house

articles.title: 如何观看阿耳忒弥斯二号航天员返回地球
articles.title_original: How to watch the Artemis II astronauts return to Earth
articles.summary: 阿耳忒弥斯二号任务的四名航天员（含一名加拿大航天员）搭乘猎户座飞船，完成为期九天的任务，该任务创造了人类有史以来距离地球最远飞行的纪录，飞船预计将高速穿越大气层后返回地球着陆。
articles.summary_original: The Orion capsule, carrying Artemis II commander Reid Wiseman, pilot Victor Glover, mission specialist Christina Koch, and Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen, is expected to land back to Earth after a nine-day mission that set a record for the farthest distance humans have ever traveled from our planet. After making a high-speed re-entry through the atmosphere, […]

articles.title: 持枪歹徒在阿富汗一野餐点杀害至少四人
articles.title_original: Gunmen kill at least four people at Afghanistan picnic spot
articles.summary: 阿富汗赫拉特省德赫梅里村附近发生枪击袭击事件，袭击者在当地一处野餐点开枪行凶。当地官员披露了这一事件，目前此次袭击已造成至少四人死亡，更多关于事件的后续细节暂未对外公布。
articles.summary_original: Officials say attackers opened fire near the village of Deh Mehri in Herat.

articles.title: 哥伦比亚对厄瓜多尔实施100%对等关税予以回击
articles.title_original: Colombia Hits Back at Ecuador With 100% Reciprocal Tariffs
articles.summary: 哥伦比亚宣布对产自厄瓜多尔的部分进口商品加征100%报复性关税，两国政府存在意识形态对立，此次反制关税措施出台后，双方之间的紧张局势进一步升级。
articles.summary_original: Colombia announced retaliatory tariffs of 100% on some imports from Ecuador, deepening tensions between the ideologically opposed governments.

articles.title: 嫦娥七号计划下半年择机发射 - 光明网
articles.summary: 嫦娥七号探月任务计划于今年下半年择机发射，相关信息由光明网发布，该任务的完整报道目前可在Google新闻平台查看，本次发射是我国探月工程的重要任务，广受各界关注，将推动我国月球探测与深空探测事业进一步发展。

articles.title: 电池回收商Ascend Elements申请破产
articles.title_original: Battery recycler Ascend Elements files for bankruptcy
articles.summary: 电池回收企业Ascend Elements宣布，将依据美国破产法第11章申请破产。此次申请破产源于企业获得的一笔政府拨款被取消，同时当前锂离子电池市场环境严峻，行业整体经营压力较大，对企业运营造成显著冲击。
articles.summary_original: Ascend Elements said that it will be filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in the wake of a canceled government grant and a challenging market for lithium-ion batteries.

articles.title: 法国一名男子因将儿子锁在面包车内一年多被起诉
articles.title_original: French man charged with locking son in van for more than a year
articles.summary: 法国一名男子将亲生儿子锁在面包车内长达一年多，目前已被正式起诉。检察官披露，被长期囚禁的男孩被发现时营养不良，赤身裸体，躺在粪便旁，已经无法行走。
articles.summary_original: The boy was found malnourished, naked, lying next to human excrement and unable to walk, the prosecutor said.

articles.title: 教会应移除被指控性虐待神父创作的艺术品吗？
articles.title_original: Should Churches Remove Art by a Priest Accused of Sexual Abuse?
articles.summary: 罗马天主教神父马尔科·伊万·鲁普尼克曾在包括梵蒂冈在内的全球天主教范围内创作多幅镶嵌画，近日有修女指控他实施性虐待，事件引发关注后，出现了要求移除各处他创作的艺术品的呼声。
articles.summary_original: The Rev. Marko Ivan Rupnik has installed mosaics across the Roman Catholic world, including at the Vatican. After nuns accused him of abuse, some want his work removed.

articles.title: 微软终于允许Windows 11测试者无需ViVeTool解锁实验性功能
articles.title_original: Microsoft finally lets Windows 11 testers unlock experimental features without ViVeTool
articles.summary: 微软调整Windows预览体验计划，将原开发、Canary测试通道简化整合为全新实验性通道，同时更新现有Beta通道。调整后，Windows 11测试人员无需下载ViVeTool这类第三方工具，即可直接解锁使用系统的实验性功能。
articles.summary_original: Microsoft is finally allowing Windows 11 testers to get access to experimental features without having to download a third-party app like ViVeTool. The changes are part of making the Windows Insider Program (WIP) less confusing, with Dev and Canary testing rings simplified into a new Experimental Channel alongside a refresh of the existing Beta Channel. […]

articles.title: 我常用的这款电动螺丝刀今日直降超五成
articles.title_original: My go-to electric screwdriver is on sale for over 50 percent off today
articles.summary: 新锐工具品牌Fanttik和Hoto一样，正快速成为家喻户晓的品牌，其推出的无线工具静音实用，设计比普通线下五金店、社区工具库的产品更美观，旗下代表产品S1 Pro电动螺丝刀目前正推出直降超五成的优惠。
articles.summary_original: Fanttik, like Hoto, is quickly becoming a household name. The tool brand’s cordless wares are quiet, capable, and certainly more stylish than anything you’d find at your local Ace Hardware or neighborhood tool library. The S1 Pro electric screwdriver is a great example of the company’s penchant for attractive design, one you can currently grab […]

articles.title: 亚马逊Luna取消第三方游戏购买功能
articles.title_original: Amazon Luna axes third-party game purchases
articles.summary: 亚马逊旗下云游戏服务Luna周五宣布重大调整，将停止开放第三方游戏及订阅的购买功能，用户此前已购买的第三方游戏将于2026年6月10日从该平台移除，用户仍可通过购买时绑定的EA、GOG、育碧等账户在其他平台正常游玩。
articles.summary_original: Amazon Luna announced a big change on Friday that will prevent players from purchasing third-party games and subscriptions. The cloud gaming service will remove previously purchased games on June 10th, 2026, though they'll still be available to play on other platforms through the EA, GOG, or Ubisoft accounts players used when purchasing the title. In […]

articles.title: 韩国部署热成像摄像机搜寻出逃动物园的灰狼
articles.title_original: South Korea deploys thermal imaging cameras in search for escaped zoo wolf
articles.summary: 韩国中部城市大田的一家动物园发生灰狼出逃事件，相关官员透露，出逃的是一只名为努克的雄性灰狼，于本周三逃出园区，目前相关部门已部署热成像摄像机，全力搜寻这头出逃的灰狼。
articles.summary_original: The male wolf, named Neukgu, escaped a zoo in the central city of Daejeon on Wednesday, officials said.

articles.title: 伊朗乐高AI视频创作者称作品走红靠“用心”
articles.title_original: The Iranian Lego AI video creators credit their virality to ‘heart’
articles.summary: 特朗普将一名战机在伊朗境内被击落的美军飞行员的救援行动，宣传为一场圆满成功。伊朗内容创作团队“爆炸传媒”制作了多条AI生成的乐高风格走红视频，呈现出与官方说辞截然不同的故事，该团队称作品爆火源于“用心”。
articles.summary_original: Donald Trump has spun the recent rescue of a downed airman whose fighter jet was destroyed behind Iranian borders as a resounding success. But the story is very different in one of the many viral, AI-generated Lego videos that have been produced by Iranian content creation group Explosive Media in the weeks since the US […]

articles.title: 以色列定居者袭击约旦河西岸被占领村庄 一巴勒斯坦人遭枪杀身亡
articles.title_original: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack on occupied West Bank village
articles.summary: 以色列定居者对约旦河西岸被占领地区的一处巴勒斯坦村庄发动袭击，一名巴勒斯坦人在袭击中中枪身亡。该事件发生之际，以色列前安全负责人发出警告，由政府支持的犹太恐怖主义目前已经失控。
articles.summary_original: The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control.

articles.title: 出入境数据走高 春日中国热度拉升 - 中国网新闻中心
articles.summary: 今年一季度，全国出入境人次达1.85亿，较去年同期上升13.5%，出入境数据持续走高，凸显春日中国出入境活跃度提升，整体经济社会热度不断拉升。与此同时，一季度相关部门共侦办妨害国（边）境管理犯罪案件5507起。

articles.title: Little Snitch反监控软件从Mac登陆Linux
articles.title_original: Little Snitch’s software counter surveillance jumps from Mac to Linux
articles.summary: 本周，知名macOS端应用Little Snitch正式将其网络监控工具引入Linux平台。开发方Objective Development的开发人员在官宣博客中分享了早期测试结果，称一周内在Ubuntu系统中发现有9个系统进程进行互联网连接。
articles.summary_original: The popular macOS app Little Snitch brought its network-monitoring tools over to Linux this week. In a blog post announcing the launch, one of the developers at Objective Development shared some early results from using the app on Linux: "On Ubuntu, I found 9 system processes making internet connections over the course of one week. […]

articles.title: 研究人员称乌干达黑猩猩陷入残酷“内战”
articles.title_original: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
articles.summary: 原本联系紧密的乌干达恩戈戈黑猩猩群落，过去八年来一直处于内部对立冲突状态。研究人员将这场发生在黑猩猩群落内部的长期矛盾冲突，形容为一场残酷的“内战”。
articles.summary_original: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years.

articles.title: 跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI，称ChatGPT助长施害者妄想且无视她的警告
articles.title_original: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
articles.summary: 遭前男友跟踪骚扰的女子提起新诉讼，指控施害者使用ChatGPT骚扰她期间，OpenAI先后三次收到该用户存在危险的警示，其中包含平台自身标记的大规模伤亡风险标识，但OpenAI未予处理，原告称ChatGPT助长了施害者的妄想。
articles.summary_original: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

articles.title: 被跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI，称ChatGPT助长施害者妄想且无视其警告
articles.title_original: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
articles.summary: 一名遭前男友跟踪骚扰的女性近日提起新诉讼，指控施害者对她实施跟踪骚扰期间，OpenAI无视三次关于该用户存在危险的警告，其中还包括系统自身触发的大规模伤亡风险标记，原告称ChatGPT助长了施害者的妄想。
articles.summary_original: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

articles.title: TechCrunch将赴东京 带来创业竞技场活动
articles.title_original: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
articles.summary: SusHi Tech 2026聚焦AI、机器人、韧性科技、娱乐四大重塑社会的科技领域，活动将安排人形机器人现场演示、自动驾驶软件革命主题研讨，还将开展网络防御、气候技术深度探讨，以及围绕AI重构全球音乐与动漫产业的坦诚交流。
articles.summary_original: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.

articles.title: TechCrunch将赴东京举办创业竞技场活动
articles.title_original: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
articles.summary: TechCrunch将赴东京开展相关活动，2026年SusHi Tech将聚焦AI、机器人、韧性、娱乐四大重塑社会的科技领域，设置人形机器人演示、自动驾驶等领域深度研讨，还将开展AI重塑全球音乐、动漫产业的开放对话。
articles.summary_original: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.

articles.title: ‘我受够了’：对特朗普不满，斯塔默转向交好其他盟友
articles.title_original: ‘I’m Fed Up.’ Frustrated With Trump, Starmer Embraces Other Allies.
articles.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默因对美国前总统特朗普不满，原本特殊的英美关系出现恶化。目前斯塔默正着力调整英国外交布局，持续加强英国与欧洲、中东地区的盟友联系，拓展自身外交空间。
articles.summary_original: Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Britain is strengthening ties in Europe and the Middle East as the once-special relationship with America sours.

articles.title: 外交关系遇冷：日本十年来首次下调对华评估 - DW.com
articles.summary: 日本发布新版《外交蓝皮书》，十年来首次下调对华关系评估，对中日关系表述降级，这一举动引发国际舆论关注，DW、RFI及中外多家主流媒体均对此进行报道，中国外交部也就此事作出公开回应，新版蓝皮书同时提及欲推动中东局势缓和。

articles.title: 国会终于可关闭大规模监控漏洞，但他们会这么做吗？
articles.title_original: Congress can finally close a mass surveillance loophole — but will they?
articles.summary: 美国一项已运行数十年的无证监听授权《外国情报监控法》第702条将于4月20日到期，国会正就其续期进行审议。该条款上一次重新授权在2024年，由进步民主党人与极右翼自由核心小组组成的跨党派联盟认为，该条款早该改革。
articles.summary_original: A warrantless wiretapping authority that has facilitated surveillance for decades is up for renewal in Congress. Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), last reauthorized in 2024, is set to expire on April 20th. A bipartisan coalition of progressive Democrats and members of the hard-right Freedom Caucus say it's long overdue for reform. […]

articles.title: Bose Soundlink Flex耐用蓝牙扬声器促销 最高直降50美元
articles.title_original: Bose’s rugged Soundlink Flex Bluetooth speaker is on sale for up to $50 off
articles.summary: 上个月亚马逊春季大促期间就推出了多款Bose产品优惠，不过此次Bose最新款Soundlink Flex便携蓝牙扬声器的降价幅度更大。目前该产品在亚马逊开启促销，部分配色起售价为109美元，最高可优惠50美元。
articles.summary_original: We saw a host of excellent Bose discounts during Amazon’s so-called Big Spring Sale last month; however, none of them were quite as steep as the current price drop we’re seeing on the latest Bose Soundlink Flex. Right now, the portable speaker is on sale at Amazon in select colors starting at $109 ($50 off), […]

articles.title: 被控胁迫妻子与120名男子发生性关系的男子在瑞典受审
articles.title_original: Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden
articles.summary: 瑞典日前开庭审理一起案件，一名61岁男子被指控通过暴力威胁、给妻子下药的方式，胁迫妻子与共计120名陌生男子发生性关系，面对指控，该男子否认全部涉案指控。
articles.summary_original: The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers.

articles.title: 美国尴尬地发现：又得求中国帮忙了 - guancha.cn
articles.summary: 近期中东美伊交战后，美军弹药大量耗尽，正计划重新储备武器库存。目前美国军工供应链的核心矿物对中国依存度较高，美媒指出，美军重建武器库存的计划受制于中国，美国因此陷入需向中国求助的尴尬处境。

articles.title: 法国将弃用Windows改用Linux 降低对美国科技依赖
articles.title_original: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
articles.summary: 法国计划弃用Windows操作系统，转而改用Linux系统，这是法国为降低本国对美国科技巨头的依赖推出的最新举措，有望帮助法国减少科技领域对美国企业的技术绑定，提升本国数字基础设施的自主可控程度。
articles.summary_original: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

articles.title: YouTube Premium及YouTube Music涨价
articles.title_original: YouTube Premium and YouTube Music are getting more expensive
articles.summary: YouTube旗下两款付费订阅服务YouTube Premium和YouTube Music迎来价格上涨。此次调价中，YouTube Premium个人月套餐价格从此前的13.99美元涨至15.99美元，家庭月套餐价格则从22.99美元上调至26.99美元。
articles.summary_original: The YouTube Premium individual plan is increasing from $13.99 to $15.99 per month, while the family plan is increasing from $22.99 to $26.99 per month.
